essence: Operates and maintains 3D printers and post‑processing equipment for prototyping and production.

identity.title: Additive Manufacturing Technician
identity.summary: Prepares print jobs, monitors builds, performs post‑processing, and maintains additive manufacturing equipment.

salary.notes: Specialist technicians in metal AM or aerospace sectors earn higher wages.

qualifications: Experience with FDM, SLA, SLS, or metal AM processes
Skills in CAD preparation and slicing software
Workshop skills for post‑processing and finishing
Understanding of material properties and safety

lifestyle.description: Workshop environment with hands‑on machine operation and finishing work. Project‑based tasks with attention to detail.
